title: Microchip (MCHP) Resilient About Prospects Despite Challenges
text: Microchip Technology (MCHP) is on track to meet its previously announced revenue guidance, riding on its investments to address key megatrends like AI and ML.

title: Microchip Technology to Present at the Credit Suisse 26th Annual Technology Conference
text: CHANDLER, Ariz., Nov. 28, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- (NASDAQ:MCHP) – Microchip Technology Incorporated, a leading provider of smart, connected and secure embedded control solutions, announced today that the Company will present at the Credit Suisse 26th Annual Technology Conference on Wednesday, September 14 at 9:15 a.m. (Pacific Time). Presenting for the Company will be Mr. Ganesh Moorthy, Executive Chair. A live webcast of the presentation will be made available by Credit Suisse, and can be accessed on the Microchip website at www.microchip.com.

title: Microchip Technology Reaffirms Fiscal Third Quarter 2023 Guidance
text: CHANDLER, Ariz., Nov. 28, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- (NASDAQ: MCHP) - Microchip Technology Incorporated, a leading provider of smart, connected and secure embedded control solutions, reiterated its quarterly guidance initially issued on November 3, 2022. Microchip expects consolidated net sales for the December 2022 quarter to be $2.135 billion to $2.177 billion, which would result in sequential growth of between 3.0% and 5.0%, or 22.7% year-over-year growth, at the mid-point of the guidance range. The Company also reaffirms its expectations for sequential revenue growth for the March 2023 quarter.

title: 6 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average and median increase of 8.8%.

title: Microchip Technology Standing Out As The Cycle Turns
text: Microchip Technology's fiscal second quarter results were similar to many peers with strong year-over-year revenue growth and margins, but guidance for sequential growth stood out. Microchip's MCU business seems to be performing well, and the company remains capacity-constrained for many specialized trailing-edge products as backlogs hit a record high.

title: Microchip (MCHP) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: Microchip's (MCHP) second-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect continued momentum in the microcontroller business.

title: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Microchip Tech (MCHP) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.39% and 0.52%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Microchip Technology Posts Beat-And-Raise Quarterly Report
text: Microchip Technology beat Wall Street's targets for its fiscal second quarter and guided higher for the current period. The post Microchip Technology Posts Beat-And-Raise Quarterly Report appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Microchip Technology Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend 41.4% Year-Over-Year to 32.8 Cents Per Share
text: CHANDLER, Ariz., Nov. 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- (NASDAQ: MCHP) – Microchip Technology Incorporated, a leading provider of smart, connected, and secure embedded control solutions, today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of 32.8 cents per share. The dividend is payable on December 6, 2022, to stockholders of record on November 22, 2022. Microchip initiated quarterly cash dividend payments in the third quarter of fiscal year 2003 and has increased its dividend 72 times since its inception.
